open_questions.question: What is the OEM connector designation for the primary cab-to-engine / firewall pass-through used for powertrain control signals on this exact silo?
Which harness family carries APPS (accelerator pedal position) from cab to PCM/engine bay on 2019 F-450 Chassis Cab 4x2?
Where are ignition-run / start discrete circuits exposed relative to the firewall interconnect?
Which CAN bus(es) cross the firewall (HS-CAN / MS-CAN / other) and where are termination resistors located?
Which instrument-cluster feedback lines are required to avoid conversion-induced DTCs when ICE is removed?
open_questions.notes: Answer is evidence-gated; no speculative splice map.
